sfdc:query.sfdc:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Quarter__c, Target_FTE__c, Approved_FTE_Coverage__c, Gap_To_Target__c, Production_Context__c, Plant__r.Name, Plant__r.Plant_Code__c, Plant__r.Id, Plant_Shop__r.Name, Plant_Shop__r.Shop_Type__c, Plant_Shop__r.Id FROM GWB_HQ_Target__c WHERE Id = ':vars.targetId' LIMIT 1

SELECT Id, Name, Auth_Positions__c, Current_Headcount__c, Shift_Pattern__c, Station__c, Active__c FROM GWB_Plant_Function__c WHERE Plant_Shop__c = ':vars.hqTarget['Plant_Shop__r.Id']' AND Active__c = true ORDER BY Name ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT Signal_Type__c FROM GWB_Edge_Signal__c WHERE Plant_Function__r.Plant_Shop__r.Plant__r.Plant_Code__c = ':vars.hqTarget['Plant__r.Plant_Code__c']' ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 1

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java var t = vars.hqTarget var fn = vars.plantFunction var sig = vars.recentSignal --- { targetId: vars.targetId, plantName: t.'Plant__r.Name' default "", plantCode: t.'Plant__r.Plant_Code__c' default vars.plantCode, plantId: t.'Plant__r.Id' default null, shopName: t.'Plant_Shop__r.Name' default vars.shopName, shopType: t.'Plant_Shop__r.Shop_Type__c' default "", shopId: t.'Plant_Shop__r.Id' default null, quarter: t.Quarter__c default vars.quarter, targetFTE: t.Target_FTE__c default 0, approvedFTE: t.Approved_FTE_Coverage__c default 0, gapToTarget: t.Gap_To_Target__c default (t.Target_FTE__c default 0), productionContext: t.Production_Context__c default "", plantFunctionId: fn.Id default null, functionName: fn.Name default "", authPositions: fn.Auth_Positions__c default 0, currentHeadcount: fn.Current_Headcount__c default 0, recentSignalType: sig.Signal_Type__c default "Bin-Depletion" }

logger.message: #['[PlantIQ] Step 1 — Plant: ' ++ payload.plantCode ++ ' | Shop: ' ++ payload.shopName ++ ' | Gap: ' ++ (payload.gapToTarget as String) ++ ' FTE']

sfdc:query.sfdc:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Idea_Category__c, Applicable_Signal_Types__c, Typical_FTE_Min__c, Typical_FTE_Max__c, Typical_Effort__c, Requires_Safety_Review__c, Requires_Quality_Review__c, Requires_Finance_Approval__c, Description__c, Preconditions__c FROM GWB_Idea_Library__c WHERE Applicable_Signal_Types__c INCLUDES (':vars.signalType') ORDER BY Typical_FTE_Max__c DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

logger.message: #['[PlantIQ] Step 2 — Matched ' ++ (sizeOf(payload) as String) ++ ' ideas for signal: ' ++ vars.signalType]

sfdc:query.sfdc:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Idea_Library__c, Shop_Type__c, Achieved_FTE__c, Quarter__c, Production_Context__c, Notes__c, Plant__r.Plant_Code__c, Plant__r.Name FROM GWB_Plant_Benchmark__c WHERE Idea_Library__c IN (':vars.ideaIdList') AND Shop_Type__c = ':vars.plantContext.shopType'

logger.message: #['[PlantIQ] Step 3 — Top idea after scoring: ' ++ (payload[0].ideaName default 'none') ++ ' | Score: ' ++ ((payload[0].score default 0) as String)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json var ctx = vars.plantContext var top3 = vars.scoredIdeas[0 to 2] --- { promptTemplateDeveloperName: "PlantIQ_Recommendation", inputParams: { "Input:Target_Context": "Plant: " ++ ctx.plantName ++ " (" ++ ctx.plantCode ++ ")
" ++ "Shop: " ++ ctx.shopName ++ "
" ++ "Quarter: " ++ ctx.quarter ++ "
" ++ "HQ Target FTE Reduction: " ++ (ctx.targetFTE as String) ++ "
" ++ "Approved FTE Coverage: " ++ (ctx.approvedFTE as String) ++ "
" ++ "Gap To Target: " ++ (ctx.gapToTarget as String) ++ " FTE
" ++ "Authorized Positions: " ++ (ctx.authPositions as String) ++ "
" ++ "Current Headcount: " ++ (ctx.currentHeadcount as String), "Input:Production_Context": if (ctx.productionContext != "") ctx.productionContext else "Standard production mix", "Input:Scored_Ideas_JSON": write(top3, "application/json"), "Input:Benchmark_Evidence": top3[0].benchmarkEvidence default "No cross-plant benchmarks available", "Input:Guardrails": "Select ONLY from the ideas listed in Scored_Ideas_JSON. " ++ "Do not invent new ideas. FTE dollar value = FTE x 130000. " ++ "Return in EXACTLY this format:
" ++ "IDEA: <name>
FTE_IMPACT: <number>
DOLLAR_IMPACT: <number>
" ++ "CONFIDENCE: <0-100>
EFFORT: <Low|Medium|High>
" ++ "REASONING: <2 sentences max>
REQUIRED_VALIDATIONS: <comma list>" } }

logger.message: #['[PlantIQ] Step 4 — LLM selected: ' ++ payload.selectedIdeaName ++ ' | FTE: ' ++ (payload.fteImpact as String) ++ ' | Confidence: ' ++ (payload.confidenceScore as String) ++ '%']

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java var ctx = vars.plantContext var rec = vars.recommendation var top = vars.scoredIdeas[0] --- [{ Name: ctx.plantCode ++ " " ++ ctx.shopName ++ ": " ++ rec.selectedIdeaName, Plant_Function__c: ctx.plantFunctionId, Idea_Library__c: top.ideaId, Idea_Type__c: "Permanent", Status__c: "Pending Approval", FTE_Impact__c: rec.fteImpact, Dollar_Impact__c: rec.dollarImpact, Confidence_Score__c: rec.confidenceScore, Effort__c: if (rec.effort != "") rec.effort else top.effort, AI_Generated__c: true, Assumptions__c: rec.reasoning, Benchmark_Evidence__c: top.benchmarkEvidence default "", Required_Validations__c: rec.requiredValidations }]
